div.head: Mr. Mizner to Mr. Blaine.

opener.dateline:
Legation of the United States,
San Salvador, August 12, 1890. (Received August 12.)

div.p: Mr. Mizner informs Mr. Blaine that peace has been suggested by the Provisional Government of Salvador upon terms of nonintervention, and that he will telegraph from Guatemala on the 16th instant, as soon as he can confer with the Guatemalan Government. He reports that armies are quiet and in camp.
